purpose: Machine-readable registry for automated LCA production dry-run capabilities that Foundry may route without owning shared CLI business logic.

capabilities.input_contract: Task frontmatter or explicit kind/category/dataset_type/required_gates options
capabilities.output_contract: capability-route-plan.json plus capability-selection.json and route markdown report
capabilities.verification_gate: missing_capabilities must be zero before autonomous adapter execution

capabilities.input_contract: JSON object with target process and candidate rows
capabilities.output_contract: IdentityPreflightReport plus outputs/identity-decision.json and outputs/identity-candidates.jsonl
capabilities.verification_gate: decision must be reuse, update_same_row, version_bump, create_new, block_duplicate, or manual_review

capabilities.input_contract: JSON object with target flow and candidate rows
capabilities.output_contract: IdentityPreflightReport plus outputs/identity-decision.json and outputs/identity-candidates.jsonl
capabilities.verification_gate: decision must be reuse, update_same_row, version_bump, create_new, block_duplicate, or manual_review

capabilities.input_contract: Process BuildPlan JSON with identity decision, evidence manifest, name plan, target geography/technology route, and quantitative reference plan
capabilities.output_contract: BuildPlanGateReport at outputs/build-plan-gate-report.json
capabilities.verification_gate: status passed before process payload materialization or status blocked with explicit blockers

capabilities.input_contract: Flow BuildPlan JSON with identity decision, evidence manifest, name plan, flow type, reference property, and reference unit
capabilities.output_contract: BuildPlanGateReport at outputs/build-plan-gate-report.json
capabilities.verification_gate: status passed before flow payload materialization or status blocked with explicit blockers

capabilities.input_contract: Process BuildPlan JSON accepted by the validate gate
capabilities.output_contract: BuildPlanGateReport plus outputs/materialized-process.json when not blocked
capabilities.verification_gate: materialized artifact is present only when the BuildPlan gate passes

capabilities.input_contract: Flow BuildPlan JSON accepted by the validate gate
capabilities.output_contract: BuildPlanGateReport plus outputs/materialized-flow.json when not blocked
capabilities.verification_gate: materialized artifact is present only when the BuildPlan gate passes

capabilities.input_contract: Process rows as JSON or JSONL, optional sibling flow rows for reference-flow unit inference, and optional row-level authoring evidence or evidenceManifest field bindings
capabilities.output_contract: Completed process rows plus process-required-fields-report.json and process-required-fields-evidence.jsonl
capabilities.verification_gate: counts.blocked must be zero and output rows must be used by downstream process validation gates

capabilities.input_contract: Process rows as JSON or JSONL
capabilities.output_contract: DatasetValidateReport plus split valid/invalid rows under outputs/
capabilities.verification_gate: counts.invalid must be zero for target-quality readiness

capabilities.input_contract: Flow rows as JSON or JSONL
capabilities.output_contract: DatasetValidateReport plus split valid/invalid rows under outputs/
capabilities.verification_gate: counts.invalid must be zero for target-quality readiness

capabilities.input_contract: Process rows as JSONL or process review materialization input
capabilities.output_contract: ProcessReviewReport plus markdown and JSON review artifacts
capabilities.verification_gate: review command must complete before target-quality readiness

capabilities.input_contract: Flow rows as JSONL or flow review materialization input
capabilities.output_contract: FlowReviewReport plus rule/LLM finding artifacts
capabilities.verification_gate: review command must complete before target-quality readiness

capabilities.input_contract: Process rows as JSON or JSONL
capabilities.output_contract: trans-units.jsonl and extract-report.json
capabilities.verification_gate: translation units must be available for AI transcreation review

capabilities.input_contract: Flow rows as JSON or JSONL
capabilities.output_contract: trans-units.jsonl and extract-report.json
capabilities.verification_gate: translation units must be available for AI transcreation review

capabilities.input_contract: Process rows plus reviewed translation JSONL
capabilities.output_contract: translated rows, translation-evidence.json, and bilingual-apply-report.json
capabilities.verification_gate: apply report status must be completed and translation evidence must exist

capabilities.input_contract: Flow rows plus reviewed translation JSONL
capabilities.output_contract: translated rows, translation-evidence.json, and bilingual-apply-report.json
capabilities.verification_gate: apply report status must be completed and translation evidence must exist

capabilities.input_contract: Process rows as JSON or JSONL
capabilities.output_contract: bilingual validate report, findings JSONL, schema gate, and process review artifacts
capabilities.verification_gate: status must be completed and scan.blocker_count must be zero

capabilities.input_contract: Flow rows as JSON or JSONL
capabilities.output_contract: bilingual validate report, findings JSONL, schema gate, and flow review artifacts
capabilities.verification_gate: status must be completed and scan.blocker_count must be zero

capabilities.input_contract: Process rows as JSON or JSONL with root dataset id/version and TIDAS references
capabilities.output_contract: remote-verification-report.json, remote-verification.jsonl, and blockers.jsonl
capabilities.verification_gate: counts.blockers must be zero before publish-prep or remote write approval

capabilities.input_contract: Flow rows as JSON or JSONL with root dataset id/version and TIDAS references
capabilities.output_contract: remote-verification-report.json, remote-verification.jsonl, and blockers.jsonl
capabilities.verification_gate: counts.blockers must be zero before publish-prep or remote write approval

capabilities.input_contract: Process rows as JSON or JSONL after schema/review/bilingual gates
capabilities.output_contract: refreshed process rows, remote-refresh-report.json, patch JSONL, and pre/post remote verification reports
capabilities.verification_gate: post_refresh_blockers must be zero and refreshed rows must be used by publish-prep

capabilities.input_contract: Flow rows as JSON or JSONL after schema/review/bilingual gates
capabilities.output_contract: refreshed flow rows, remote-refresh-report.json, patch JSONL, and pre/post remote verification reports
capabilities.verification_gate: post_refresh_blockers must be zero and refreshed rows must be used by publish-prep

capabilities.input_contract: target-dataset-gate-report.json plus mutation-plan-handoff.json with publish_gate_ready entries
capabilities.output_contract: post-write-verification-report.json, gate-index.json, verification-handoff.json, coverage-delta.json, and Edge verify request artifacts
capabilities.verification_gate: post-write process and flow remote verification blockers must be zero before publish-ready handoff

capabilities.input_contract: rootPolicy plus table/id/version/role/path reference list generated from verified rows
capabilities.output_contract: Edge command response with checks, blockers, state_code, user_id, modified_at, and optional payload hash verification
capabilities.verification_gate: Edge readback blockers must be zero when the Edge endpoint is configured or explicitly required
source_manifest_requirements: edge verify response JSON or skipped-not-configured record

capabilities.input_contract: matrix_readiness_input.v1 JSON with snapshot coverage, sparse payload, optional compiled graph/provider evidence, policy, or a target-dataset-gate-report plus account-visible provider rows and reviewed provider decisions that Foundry converts into matrix input
capabilities.output_contract: matrix_readiness_report.v1 JSON plus Foundry matrix-readiness-verification-report.json, target-process-graph.json when target rows are used, gate-index.json, verification-handoff.json, coverage-delta.json, and command capture
capabilities.verification_gate: report.status must be passed, blockers must be empty, provider closure must meet policy, graph readiness must be closed, and compute stability must be factorization-ready before publish-prep
source_manifest_requirements: matrix readiness input or target gate report
provider scope manifest when account-visible providers are requested
reviewed provider decisions when ambiguous providers are resolved

capabilities.input_contract: Canonical process payload rows plus explicit out-dir and publish intent metadata
capabilities.output_contract: Publish bundle/request/intent plus reports/process-publish-schema-gate.json
capabilities.verification_gate: process_schema_gate.blocker_count must be zero before any publish run can consume the bundle

capabilities.input_contract: Flow payload JSONL plus explicit out-dir, dry-run/commit mode, and commit limit
capabilities.output_contract: flow-publish-version-gate-report.json plus success/failure JSONL publish attempt records
capabilities.verification_gate: flow_gate.blocker_count must be zero and commit mode must be explicitly approved before remote mutation

capabilities.input_contract: Reviewed flow rows prepared by dataset gates
capabilities.output_contract: Delegated flow publish-version outputs including flow-publish-version-gate-report.json
capabilities.verification_gate: delegated flow_gate.blocker_count must be zero and commit mode must be explicitly approved

capabilities.input_contract: Publish request/bundle with process and flow payload references
capabilities.output_contract: publish-report.json plus verification-report.json
capabilities.verification_gate: verification.blocker_count must be zero, no deferred/failed step remains, and commit requires explicit approval

capabilities.input_contract: Sanitized sample scenario row with flow type
capabilities.output_contract: Per-sample provider_closure status in dry-run-report.json
capabilities.verification_gate: Elementary flow samples are skipped for product/provider closure matching

capabilities.input_contract: specs/automated-lca-golden-fixtures.json plus optional sample, target-dataset, and compute runtime reports
capabilities.output_contract: golden-fixtures-check-report.json plus markdown fixture coverage report
capabilities.verification_gate: required fixture coverage classes must be present and runtime checks must pass when reports are supplied
